beforeEdit.docs/archive/**: echo 'WARNING: editing archived doc — archived docs should not be modified. Use the current doc instead.' && exit 1
beforeEdit.docs/POSTLAUNCH.md: echo 'WARNING: editing POSTLAUNCH.md — this is v1.5+ content and should NOT be implemented in v1.0 sprints.'

afterEdit.src/engine/**/*.ts: echo 'Reminder: engine files must not use Math.random() or Date.now() (CODE-9)'
afterEdit.src/**/*.ts: echo 'Reminder: check file is under 200 lines (CODE-2) and uses constants from config/ (CODE-1)'

systemPrompt: This is the SYNAPSE project — a mobile idle/incremental game. Always read docs/PROGRESS.md at session start. Follow rules CODE-1 through CODE-9 in CLAUDE.md strictly. When in doubt about mechanics, defer to docs/GDD.md. When in doubt about sprint scope, defer to docs/SPRINTS.md. Never implement features marked v1.5+ in docs/POSTLAUNCH.md during v1.0 development.
